message:
Close bd-iuvb.13: Live Markdown Editor integration complete

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1186,7 +1186,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.10","title":"Demo: Widget Builder Sandbox","description":"Background
- Widget library breadth is impressive but static in the gallery.
- A builder lets users "play" and feel the system.

Goals
- Interactive widget composition with live prop toggles.
- Show widget tree hierarchy and render order.
- Allow saving/loading presets for deterministic replay.

Menu/IA Fit
- Category: Interaction.
- Short label: "Builder".
- Registry tags: "widgets", "compose".

Implementation Notes
- Use existing widgets and a local model to modify props.
- Provide a simple preset list and export to JSONL.
- Ensure no new files unless strictly required (per repo policy).

Acceptance Criteria
- User can assemble a small UI from 3–5 widgets.
- Prop changes are visible immediately and reversible.
- Presets reapply deterministically.
- Widget tree visualization matches rendered order.
- Screen registered in Screen Registry (category, label, tags, blurb).

Tests / Validation
- Unit tests for preset serialization round-trip.
- Snapshot tests for preset states.
- E2E PTY run (extend `scripts/e2e_demo_showcase.sh`) with JSONL logs:
  - run_id, preset_id, widget_count, props_hash, outcome","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:08.197982900Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T05:04:46.009959814Z","closed_at":"2026-02-04T05:04:46.009939746Z","close_reason":"Implemented widget builder JSONL export + tests + snapshots + E2E step","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.10","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:08.197982900Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.11","title":"Demo: Command Palette Evidence Lab","description":"Background
- Command palette uses Bayesian ranking, but users don't see why results rank.

Goals
- Show evidence ledger for each result (match type, factors, posterior).
- Provide toggles for match modes (exact, prefix, substring, fuzzy).
- Include a small benchmark panel (queries/sec) in deterministic mode.

Menu/IA Fit
- Category: Interaction.
- Short label: "Palette".
- Registry tags: "search", "bayes", "rank".

Implementation Notes
- Use existing command_palette and hint_ranker.
- Render a split view: results + evidence details.
- Include a compact "why this won" summary for the top result.

Acceptance Criteria
- Evidence ledger is visible and matches ranking behavior.
- Mode toggles update results predictably.
- Bench panel remains deterministic under fixed seed.
- Search latency stays below target threshold (displayed).
- Screen registered in Screen Registry (category, label, tags, blurb).

Tests / Validation
- Unit tests for evidence formatting and score ordering.
- Snapshot tests for each match mode.
- E2E PTY run (extend `scripts/e2e_demo_showcase.sh`) with JSONL logs:
  - run_id, query, mode, top_result, posterior, outcome","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ubuntu","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:14.033949034Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T05:35:46.900819008Z","closed_at":"2026-02-05T05:35:46.900798239Z","close_reason":"Screen already fully implemented and registered - command_palette_lab.rs with evidence ledger, mode toggles, bench panel, and hint ranker display","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.11","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:14.033949034Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.12","title":"Demo: Drag-Drop Kanban Board","description":"Background
- Drag/drop + hit testing are advanced capabilities not showcased in a real app.

Goals
- Build a small Kanban board with draggable cards and drop targets.
- Show hover/drag outlines and drop previews.
- Include keyboard alternatives for accessibility.

Menu/IA Fit
- Category: Interaction.
- Short label: "Kanban".
- Registry tags: "drag", "drop", "hit".

Implementation Notes
- Use drag module in ftui-widgets.
- Keep data set deterministic and small for stable snapshots.
- Provide deterministic scripted demo moves for tour mode.

Acceptance Criteria
- Dragging works with mouse; keyboard move alternatives exist.
- Drop preview updates as you hover columns.
- Board state changes persist within session.
- Undo/redo optional but if present must be deterministic.
- Screen registered in Screen Registry (category, label, tags, blurb).

Tests / Validation
- Unit tests for drag state transitions.
- Snapshot tests for default and dragging states.
- E2E PTY run (extend `scripts/e2e_demo_showcase.sh`) with scripted drag events and JSONL logs:
  - run_id, card_id, from_col, to_col, input_type, outcome","notes":"Added mouse drag-and-drop with hit-testing, visual feedback, 20 new drag tests (38 total). All 1015 tests passing.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ubuntu","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:20.052064760Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T05:59:45.040099406Z","closed_at":"2026-02-05T05:57:05.180575929Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.12","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:20.052064760Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-iuvb.13","title":"Demo: Live Markdown Editor (Split View)","description":"Background
- Markdown rendering exists, but live editing + preview is more compelling.

Goals
- Split-pane editor + preview with live updates.
- Highlight wrapping, code fences, and links.
- Provide search within the editor with results highlighted.

Menu/IA Fit
- Category: Text.
- Short label: "Markdown".
- Registry tags: "editor", "preview", "markdown".

Implementation Notes
- Use ftui-text rope/editor and ftui-extras markdown renderer.
- Deterministic seed and sample doc for snapshots.
- Provide a "diff mode" to compare raw vs rendered width.

Acceptance Criteria
- Editing updates preview in real time without flicker.
- Search highlights and jumps work reliably.
- Preview correctly renders lists, code blocks, links.
- Split pane remains stable under resize.
- Screen registered in Screen Registry (category, label, tags, blurb).

Tests / Validation
- Unit tests for editor search and cursor operations.
- Snapshot tests for sample doc at two sizes.
- E2E PTY run (extend `scripts/e2e_demo_showcase.sh`) with scripted edits and JSONL logs:
  - run_id, edit_seq, search_term, result_count, outcome","notes":"Attempted integration pass, but app.rs/markdown_live_editor.rs are under heavy concurrent churn from active agents; yielding claim to reduce conflicts. Will re-pick once file surface stabilizes.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SapphireBay","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:26.030601617Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T01:59:48.489030523Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.13","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:26.030601617Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Will re-pick once file surface stabilizes.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SapphireBay","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:26.030601617Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T02:21:02.564168606Z","closed_at":"2026-02-09T02:21:02.564147747Z","close_reason":"Completed: screen integrated into app with full wiring (ScreenId, registry, dispatch, accent, CLI help) + 10 tests (4 snapshots at 80x24/120x40, 6 unit tests)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.13","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:26.030601617Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.13.1","title":"Fix GFM warning admonition wrap border alignment in markdown showcase","description":"Warning admonition lines in markdown showcase lose blockquote prefix when wrapped, causing left border misalignment and broken visual box. Ensure wrapped continuation lines preserve admonition prefix and table-line detection does not classify blockquote bars as tables.","notes":"Implemented blockquote-aware wrapping in markdown showcase panels (markdown_rich_text, markdown_live_editor, dashboard): wrapped continuation lines now preserve admonition prefix bars. Tightened table-line detection so plain blockquote bars are not treated as table rows. Validated via BLESS=1 cargo test -p ftui-demo-showcase markdown_ and full gates: cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo fmt --check.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"RedMoose","created_at":"2026-02-06T18:54:45.379109192Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T19:02:27.943661646Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T19:02:27.943638363Z","close_reason":"Completed: warning admonition continuation lines keep border prefix; table detection no longer misclassifies blockquote bars","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.13.1","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.13","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T18:54:45.379109192Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.14","title":"Demo: Hyperlink Playground (OSC-8 + Hit Regions)","description":"Background
- OSC-8 hyperlinks and hit regions are powerful but under-explained.

Goals
- Display clickable links with hover/focus states.
- Show link registry IDs and OSC-8 sequences for education.
- Demonstrate keyboard navigation among links.

Menu/IA Fit
- Category: Interaction.
- Short label: "Links".
- Registry tags: "osc8", "hit", "link".

Implementation Notes
- Use LinkRegistry and HitGrid integration.
- Provide deterministic link list with sample URLs.
- Add a "raw sequence" panel for educational display.

Acceptance Criteria
- Links render with distinct styling and focus ring.
- Hover and keyboard focus highlight are visible.
- Optional panel shows link registry ID mapping and sequences.
- Screen registered in Screen Registry (category, label, tags, blurb).

Tests / Validation
- Unit tests for link registry behavior in demo state.
- Snapshot tests for normal, hover, and focus states.
- E2E PTY run (extend `scripts/e2e_demo_showcase.sh`) with scripted focus movement and JSONL logs:
  - run_id, link_id, focus_idx, action, outcome","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:31.797391729Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T02:05:16.757068820Z","closed_at":"2026-02-05T02:05:16.757048522Z","close_reason":"Hyperlink Playground screen implemented with OSC-8, hover/focus, link registry panel, JSONL logging + snapshots; included in screen sweep","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.14","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:31.797391729Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.15","title":"Demo: Performance Challenge Mode (Degradation Tiers)","description":"Background
- Degradation tiers and budgets are critical but not demonstrated interactively.

Goals
- Provide a "stress" mode that intentionally overwhelms rendering.
- Show real-time degradation tier transitions and recovery.
- Display budget metrics and decision evidence.

Menu/IA Fit
- Category: Systems.
- Short label: "Perf".
- Registry tags: "budget", "tier", "latency".

Implementation Notes
- Reuse performance HUD metrics and render budget info.
- Add deterministic stress scenarios (fixed seed, fixed workload).
- Include a "cool down" button to show recovery.

Acceptance Criteria
- Stress toggle reliably triggers degradation and recovery.
- UI clearly shows current tier and decision rationale.
- Runs without stalling input handling.
- Evidence entries are recorded for each tier change.
- Screen registered in Screen Registry (category, label, tags, blurb).

Tests / Validation
- Unit tests for stress scenario generator determinism.
- Snapshot tests for each degradation tier.
- E2E PTY run (extend `scripts/e2e_demo_showcase.sh`) with JSONL logs:
  - run_id, tier_from, tier_to, frame_time_ms, decision, outcome","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:39.834624358Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T03:03:59.234397776Z","closed_at":"2026-02-05T03:03:59.234379662Z","close_reason":"Completed performance challenge mode (stress harness + tier logging)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.15","depends_on_id":"bd-3e1t.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:52:13.446170028Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.15","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:51:39.834624358Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
